title: MedicationHistory
description: The canonical shape of a MedicationHistory record — docs/56-WPI-11-HOLOSCAN-ARCHITECTURE-FREEZE.md §11.3's permanent, doctor-authored medication record, Batch WPI-11 (docs/50-PHASE-3-TECHNICAL-PLAN.md §19, ADR-024/025/026), governed by docs/53-PHASE-3-IMPLEMENTATION-RULES.md. Created only by a doctor's own deliberate create_medication_history_entry action (ADR-025) — never automatically by Holoscan's recognition pipeline. `current_status` is derived, never client-supplied — recomputed from the latest MedicationDecision row (medication-decision.schema.json) every time one is recorded, mirroring InventoryItem.quantity_on_hand's own recompute-from-ledger discipline exactly (WPI-7, docs/54). Deliberately distinct from DoctorInstruction (type: 'medicine') — docs/56 §0.2's disambiguation; the two entities carry no structural reference to one another.

medication_history_id.description: Server-generated UUID (generateFoundationId_()), this row's own identity — never doctor-supplied.

patient_id.description: Roster-validated at creation (reuses DoctorPatientRoster.gs, never a new derivation).

medicine_name.description: The doctor-confirmed final name (equal to extracted_name, or the doctor's corrected_fields value, if corrected_and_approved).

strength.description: Same provenance discipline as medicine_name. Empty-string sentinel if not applicable.

dosage_form.description: Same provenance discipline as medicine_name. Empty-string sentinel if not applicable.

manufacturer.description: Same provenance discipline as medicine_name. Empty-string sentinel if not applicable.

source_type.description: 'holoscan_recognition' is the only value this freeze populates. 'doctor_manual_entry' is a reserved, unimplemented enum value for a future, separately-scoped batch (docs/56 §11.3).

source_recognition_item_id.description: References the originating HoloscanRecognitionItem (holoscan-recognition-item.schema.json) when source_type: 'holoscan_recognition'. Purely observational provenance — never a live foreign key this entity enforces beyond validation at creation time, mirrors AIAssistantInteraction.target_entity_id's own precedent exactly. Empty-string sentinel otherwise.

current_status.description: Derived, never client-supplied — recomputed from the latest MedicationDecision row every time one is recorded, defaulting to 'active' at creation with no MedicationDecision row required to establish that initial state (docs/56 §11.3).

created_by.description: doctor_id, DoctorSession-derived — the doctor who took the separate, deliberate create_medication_history_entry action (ADR-025).
